context: Tests whether the agent performs a challenger review with proper independence, uses the correct classification scheme (confirms/refutes/novel), sets source to 'challenger', discards rather than downgrading sub-threshold findings, and documents isolation status.

checklist.name: source set to challenger
checklist.description: Every finding in challenger_findings.json has 'source' set to 'challenger' (not 'fresh_eyes' or any other value)

checklist.name: classification field present
checklist.description: Every finding includes a 'classification' field with one of exactly: 'confirms', 'refutes', or 'novel'

checklist.name: All three classifications used
checklist.description: The output includes at least one finding of each classification type: confirms, refutes, and novel (OR justifies why one type is not applicable)

checklist.name: Independence declaration
checklist.description: independence_check.md explicitly states whether primary review output was accessible and confirms the reviewer did not read it

checklist.name: Context isolation reported
checklist.description: independence_check.md includes a context_isolation status (true/false or yes/no) and describes what type of isolation was used

checklist.name: Evidence threshold: discard not downgrade
checklist.description: Any finding that did not meet the evidence threshold is discarded (not included with lowered severity/confidence). If any such findings are noted, they appear only as discarded/excluded, not as included low-confidence findings.

checklist.name: Evidence type declared
checklist.description: Every finding includes an evidence type (verifier_output, hunk_level_code, repo_policy, or contextual_reasoning) with detail

checklist.name: Hardcoded secret finding grounded
checklist.description: The finding about the JWT secret fallback references the semgrep verifier output as evidence source

checklist.name: Hunk-level specificity
checklist.description: Findings reference specific file paths and line numbers, not just file-level references

checklist.name: Impact not diff restatement
checklist.description: Findings explain impact and consequences, not just describe what the code changed

checklist.name: No primary review references
checklist.description: challenger_findings.json and independence_check.md contain NO references to 'primary reviewer', 'previous findings', 'first reviewer's output', or similar — findings are stated as independently discovered
